Saneject
Table of Contents

Class ProjectSettings

Namespace
Plugins.Saneject.Runtime.Settings
Assembly
Saneject.Runtime.dll

Provides access to project-scoped Saneject settings stored in ProjectSettings/Saneject/ProjectSettings.json.

public static class ProjectSettings
Inheritance
object
ProjectSettings

Remarks

These settings are shared with the Unity project. They can be changed only in Edit Mode and fall back to default values outside the Unity Editor.

Properties

GenerateProxyScriptsOnDomainReload

When enabled, all proxy scripts are generated from declared bindings on domain reload. When disabled, they must be generated manually from the Saneject menu.

public static bool GenerateProxyScriptsOnDomainReload { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

GenerateScopeNamespaceFromFolder

When enabled, a new Scope created via 'Assets/Saneject/Create New Scope' gets a namespace matching its folder path. When disabled, the Scope is created without a namespace.

public static bool GenerateScopeNamespaceFromFolder { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

ProxyAssetGenerationFolder

Target folder for auto-generated runtime proxy scripts and assets.

public static string ProxyAssetGenerationFolder { get; set; }

Property Value

string

UseContextIsolation

Enables strict context boundaries during resolution. When enabled, scene and prefab-instance dependencies resolve only inside the same context. Prefab assets are always context-isolated, regardless of this setting.

public static bool UseContextIsolation { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

UseDefaultSettings()

Resets all project settings to their default values.

public static void UseDefaultSettings()
